title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
